description_long: This is a modern, armless chair with a contoured seat and backrest upholstered in rich brown leather or faux leather. The seat and back feature vertical channel tufting, adding both visual interest and extra comfort. The chair is supported by four slender, angled metal legs finished in matte black, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The seat is gently curved, providing ergonomic support for the user, while the backrest is slightly reclined for added comfort. The overall design is minimalist, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or apartment dining rooms. The materials and construction suggest durability and easy maintenance.
description: A modern brown leather-upholstered chair with vertical channel tufting and four black metal legs, featuring a contoured seat and backrest for ergonomic comfort.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical channel tufting on the seat and backrest, as well as the wide, contoured seat and the two front legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gentle recline of the backrest, the seat's ergonomic curve, and the slim profile of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned back of the chair and the positioning of all four legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's curvature and the angle of the backrest and legs.
